summary: Tested Material Request feature for Site Engineers. All features working correctly - Request Material button on project cards, dialog with auto-filled project, material dropdown with 33 approved materials (showing name and brand), material info display, quantity/remarks inputs, 48-hour notice, and successful submission. Backend APIs verified: GET /api/projects/{project_id}/approved-materials returns materials, POST /api/site-engineer/material-requests creates request with status 'requested'. Regression tests passed for SE Dashboard tabs and project card navigation.
seed_data_creation: Created material requests during testing (Cement OPC 53 Grade x 50 bags, Electrical Wire 1.5 sqmm x 10 metres)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Material Request feature is fully functional. SE has 5 assigned projects. First project 'Vinoth Kumar Villa' (proj_12f23331b542) has 33 approved materials. Request Material button uses e.stopPropagation() to prevent card navigation. Dialog shows 48-hour notice. Backend creates request with status 'requested' which goes to PM for approval.

material_request_button.button_on_project_cards: PASS - Blue 'Request Material' button appears on each project card
material_request_button.button_click_opens_dialog: PASS - Dialog opens without navigating to project detail
material_request_button.e_stop_propagation: PASS - Button click doesn't trigger card navigation

material_request_dialog.project_auto_filled: PASS - Project name 'Vinoth Kumar Villa' auto-filled
material_request_dialog.material_dropdown_loads: PASS - 33 materials loaded from approved materials list
material_request_dialog.materials_show_brand: PASS - Materials show 'Name — Brand' format (e.g., 'Electrical Wire 1.5 sqmm — Havells Lifeline')
material_request_dialog.material_info_display: PASS - After selection shows Material, Brand, Unit info
material_request_dialog.48_hours_notice: PASS - 'Minimum 48 hours required to receive materials after approval' visible

material_request_submission.submit_button: PASS - 'Request Material' button enabled after selecting material
material_request_submission.dialog_closes: PASS - Dialog closes after successful submission

regression_se_dashboard.project_card_navigation: PASS - Clicking card (not button) navigates to project detail

backend_api_tests.GET /api/projects/{project_id}/approved-: PASS - Returns 33 materials with material_id, name, brand, unit
backend_api_tests.POST /api/site-engineer/material-request: PASS - Creates request with request_id, status='requested', brand preserved
